metadata.description: Strict skill marketplace enforcing latest official APIs across modern web stacks. A single plugin bundles every skill: deprecated patterns are forbidden, current best practices are forced.

plugins.name: lockstep-run
plugins.description: Strict conventions for Vue 3.5 / Nuxt UI v4 / Tailwind v4 / TypeScript / Go Echo v5 + sqlc / Node Fastify v5 / PostgreSQL schema+migrations / Astro 6. Each skill activates by file path. Forbids <style scoped>, any, @ts-ignore, bg-opacity-*, bg-gradient-to-*, hand-written raw <button>/<input> when Nuxt UI applies, bare DROP TABLE, single-shot ALTER TABLE ... NOT NULL. Forces <script setup> + defineModel, oklch() colors, Echo HTTPErrorHandler, sqlc generated Querier, three-step NOT NULL migrations, client:visible / server:defer over client:load.
